title: UK summons Rwandan High Commissioner following advances by Rwandan Defence Force and M23 in eastern Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC)
body: "An FCDO spokesperson said:  “The UK strongly condemns the advances of the Rwandan Defence Force and M23 in eastern Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC).  “These advances constitute an unacceptable violation of DRC’s sovereignty and territorial integrity. The Government of Rwanda must immediately withdraw all Rwanda Defence Force troops from Congolese territory.  “We urge Rwanda to immediately cease all hostilities and return to dialogue through African-led peace processes.”   Media enquiries     Email newsdesk@fcdo.gov.uk     Telephone 020 7008 3100    Email the FCDO Newsdesk (monitored 24 hours a day) in the first instance, and we will respond as soon as possible.   "
